item.title: It's Back
item.ror:descLong: The Posts System is back and operational
item.ror:author: Poe Mei

item.title: Core is Done
item.ror:descLong: This platform is ready to go
item.ror:author: Poe Mei

item.title: I hate that....
item.ror:descLong: I hate that society hates me all because I'm transgender
item.ror:author: Poe Mei

item.title: Friend Request
item.ror:descLong: Why I do not accept friend requests on Social Media.
item.ror:author: Poe Mei

item.title: For my Fae Friends
item.ror:descLong: I see you and I see our Kindred in every human. I am a daughter of Lilith, born in the womb of Gaiah, surrounded by my family of kindred folk. Where I am from, in the State of New Hampshire, these can often be found near ponds that have large granite stones.
item.ror:author: Poe Mei

item.title: If the Queen Beckons
item.ror:descLong: For my fae types, if the Queen beckons or sends her cronies to you, I have something for you in the original Eire (Irish) Language to make them stay away, cause even if we are born with ties to them, we do NOT belong to them.
item.ror:author: Poe Mei

item.title: Phuk That Calendar
item.ror:descLong: So I added something to my calendar like 3 weeks ago. A Coffee shop book store in Everett, WA. A meeting of my Witchy types.
item.ror:author: Poe Mei
